promotion_guardrail: Proposal-side only. Do not promote to A2-1 kernel law from this batch without a later explicit selective promotion pass.

selection_basis.queue_reason: Selected as the next unresolved dedicated Axis-4 versus Axis-5 anti-conflation sibling after the broader Axis-4 operator-note reduction.
selection_basis.parent_reason: The parent batch already isolates the exact reusable correction note value: hot/cold direction retraction, direction-versus-intensity separation, thermodynamic analogy pressure, and remaining Axis-4 and Axis-5 overclaims.
selection_basis.comparison_anchor_reason: Existing A2-mid batches were used to keep current Axis-4 and Axis-5 semantic fences, overlay nonreplacement, and Axis-4 probe framing distinct from the older note's stronger thermodynamic mapping claims.

deferred_alternatives.reason: Deferred as the next broader contradiction-core reduction once the dedicated Axis-4 versus Axis-5 sibling was narrowed.

raw_source_reread_reason: A fresh reread of the raw note was used to preserve exact one-cycle/two-directions correction wording, the state-versus-direction distinction for hot/cold, and the closing same-cycle direction-versus-intensity decomposition.

reasons_for_candidate_status: These candidates isolate the note's strongest anti-conflation value without importing its direct axis-definition overreach.
They remain small, comparison-ready, and explicitly downstream of stronger current Axis-4 and Axis-5 semantic fences.
reasons_for_quarantine_status: These items remain direct semantic-finalization pressure rather than clean reusable A2-2 packets.
The parent batch is strong enough to preserve them explicitly, but not to promote them into active law.
notes: Operated from existing intake artifacts after reading the companion A2-mid refinement process.
Used current axis-semantic and probe-fence A2-mid packets only as comparison anchors.
A fresh raw-source reread was used because the reduction depends on exact correction wording in the source.
